description_long: This object is a decorative potted plant featuring a cluster of pink and white orchid-like flowers with broad, flat petals arranged in a rounded formation. The flowers are attached to slender, brown stems that rise from a mossy green base within the pot. The pot itself is deep blue with a subtle textured or mottled finish, and it has a rounded, slightly tapered shape. Several large, dark green leaves extend outward from the base, adding to the plant's lush appearance. The arrangement is visually balanced, with the flowers forming two main clusters and the leaves providing a natural, organic spread. A small plant label or tag is visible among the stems, suggesting it may be for identification or care instructions.
description: A blue ceramic pot holds a lush arrangement of pink and white orchid-like flowers with broad green leaves and a mossy base. The plant is decorative and features a visible plant label among the stems.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of pink and white flowers, green leaves, and the blue pot with a mossy base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with a more vertical perspective, highlighting the dense flower cluster and the pot's rounded shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flower clusters and more of the green leaves, with the plant label more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of leaves and the back of the flower petals, with less of the mossy base visible.
